title: Intense Bouncy Brazilian Yellow Split Peas Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Brazilian stew featuring yellow split peas, lacquer glaze, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a kazan cauldron. This dish is perfect for a fatty and bouncy meal prep option.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the dried yellow split peas, lacquer glaze, coconut milk, turmeric, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the cauldron from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the stew cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for meal prep.
